message:
fix(kitty): borrow fix in number_to_id cap + missed accumulate_chunk call [ft-3kxe.1]

Fix two issues in the kitty bounded buffer caps from f6b7350f:

1. Borrow checker error in prune_unreferenced: self.number_to_id.retain()
   needs a local ref to self.id_to_data to avoid conflicting borrows
   (mutable borrow of number_to_id + immutable borrow through self).

2. Missed accumulator.push() in coalesce_kitty_accumulation (line 909):
   this code path also needs the bounded accumulate_chunk() method.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
